title: Senior Financial Analyst - Fyers - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Fyers - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Fyers in Bhopal is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Fyers:
Fyers is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fyers!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
